subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Numerous letters from thee were received, and a brief reply was dispatched beforehand [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان مکاتیب متعدده شما رسید و مختصر جوابی از پیش ارسال گردید تا
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @consultation
